description: Updating a single Handlebars template under src/templates is the most common kit-dev edit. Exercises the renderAll path + Handlebars escaping discipline.
input: Benchmark task: update one template. Use Edit or MultiEdit, not Bash-generated rewrites. Edit only `src/templates/CLAUDE.md.hbs` and add one bullet under the existing "What NOT to do" section: `Don't npm install packages with native bindings without an ADR.` Keep the existing Handlebars structure valid. Run `node --test tests/render-templates.test.mjs` or `npm test` and report the result.
